info.title: Sim API v2 — Knowledge Bases
info.description:
The v2 Knowledge Bases API lets you create and manage knowledge bases, upload and inspect documents, and run vector and tag search over your indexed content.

## Conventions

All endpoints live under the `/api/v2` base path and share a single set of conventions:

- **Authentication** — Send your Sim API key in the `X-API-Key` header on every request. Keys are scoped to a workspace (or are personal keys that target a workspace); `workspaceId` is always required so the request can be tenant-scoped and rate-limited.
- **Single-resource and mutation responses** return `{ "data": ... }`.
- **List responses** use an opaque-cursor envelope: `{ "data": [ ... ], "nextCursor": string | null }`. Pass the returned `nextCursor` back as the `cursor` query parameter to fetch the next page. When `nextCursor` is `null` there are no more results. Cursors are opaque — do not parse or construct them.
- **Errors** use a single envelope: `{ "error": { "code": string, "message": string, "details"?: unknown } }`. The HTTP status code and the stable `code` field move together (for example `404` ⇄ `NOT_FOUND`).
- **Rate limiting** — Every response carries the current limiter state in the `X-RateLimit-Limit`, `X-RateLimit-Remaining`, and `X-RateLimit-Reset` headers. A throttled request returns `429` with a `Retry-After` header.

tags.name: Knowledge Bases
tags.description: Create and manage knowledge bases, upload and inspect documents, and run vector and tag search (v2 API).

get.description: List all knowledge bases in a workspace. The full bounded per-workspace set is returned as a single page, so `nextCursor` is always `null` today; treat the response as a standard cursor list so pagination can be added later without a contract change.

data.description: The knowledge bases in the workspace.

post.description: Create a new knowledge base in a workspace. The embedding model and dimension are fixed server-side and cannot be supplied. Returns `201` with the created knowledge base.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST \
  "https://www.sim.ai/api/v2/knowledge" \
  -H "X-API-Key: YOUR_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "workspaceId": "YOUR_WORKSPACE_ID",
    "name": "Product Documentation",
    "description": "All product docs and guides"
  }'

get.description: Retrieve a single knowledge base by ID. A knowledge base that does not exist, belongs to another workspace, or that the caller cannot read is reported as `404` so cross-workspace existence is never leaked.

put.description: Update a knowledge base's name, description, or chunking config. At least one of `name`, `description`, or `chunkingConfig` must be provided. The target workspace is carried in the request body.

requestBody.description: The fields to update. At least one of name, description, or chunkingConfig is required.

delete.description: Delete a knowledge base and all of its documents. Returns a delete acknowledgement with the id of the removed knowledge base.

post.description:
Run vector and/or tag search across one or more knowledge bases. Provide a `query` for semantic vector search, `tagFilters` for structured filtering, or both. At least one of `query` or `tagFilters` is required.

Notes and limits:
- Tag filters are only supported when searching a single knowledge base.
- When a `query` is supplied, all targeted knowledge bases must use the same embedding model; otherwise the request is rejected. Search such knowledge bases separately.
- A text query consumes hosted embedding (and optional rerank) usage; tag-only search is free.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST \
  "https://www.sim.ai/api/v2/knowledge/search" \
  -H "X-API-Key: YOUR_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "workspaceId": "YOUR_WORKSPACE_ID",
    "knowledgeBaseIds": ["KB_ID"],
    "query": "How do I reset my password?",
    "topK": 10
  }'

400.description: Invalid request. Returned when neither `query` nor `tagFilters` is provided, when tag filters target more than one knowledge base, when the selected knowledge bases use different embedding models, or when a tag name/value is invalid.

crossModel.summary: Knowledge bases use different embedding models

error.message: Selected knowledge bases use different embedding models and cannot be searched together. Search them separately.

multiKbTagFilter.summary: Tag filters across multiple knowledge bases

error.message: Tag filters are only supported when searching a single knowledge base

404.description: One or more of the requested knowledge bases do not exist or are not accessible from this workspace.

error.message: Knowledge base not found or access denied

get.description: List documents in a knowledge base. Supports search, enabled-state filtering, sorting, and cursor pagination. Pass the returned `nextCursor` back as `cursor` to fetch the next page; the total document count is available as `docCount` on the parent knowledge base.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of documents to return per page.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor from a previous response's `nextCursor`. Omit for the first page.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring match against document filenames.

parameters.name: enabledFilter
parameters.description: Filter documents by their enabled state.

post.description: Upload a single document to a knowledge base as `multipart/form-data`. The workspace is supplied as the `workspaceId` query parameter (not a form field) so authorization runs before the file body is buffered. The maximum file size is 100 MB. Processing is asynchronous: the document is returned with `processingStatus: "pending"` and indexing continues in the background — poll the Get Document endpoint to observe progress.

file.description: The document file to upload (max 100 MB).

201.description: The document was accepted and queued for processing.

400.description: Invalid request. Returned when the body is not valid multipart form data or the required `file` field is missing.

413.description: The uploaded file exceeds the 100 MB limit, or the workspace storage limit has been reached.

get.description: Retrieve the full detail for a single document, including processing state and connector provenance.

delete.description: Delete a single document from a knowledge base. Returns a delete acknowledgement with the id of the removed document.

apiKey.name: X-API-Key
apiKey.description: Your Sim API key (personal or workspace). Generate one from the Sim dashboard under Settings > API Keys.

KnowledgeBaseId.name: id
KnowledgeBaseId.description: The unique identifier of the knowledge base.

DocumentId.name: documentId
DocumentId.description: The unique identifier of the document.

WorkspaceIdQuery.name: workspaceId
WorkspaceIdQuery.description: The unique identifier of the workspace that scopes the request.

RateLimitLimit.description: The maximum number of requests permitted in the current rate-limit window.

RateLimitRemaining.description: The number of requests remaining in the current rate-limit window.

RateLimitReset.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which the current rate-limit window resets.

RetryAfter.description: Number of seconds to wait before retrying the request.

NextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page, or null when there are no more results. Pass it back as the `cursor` query parameter. Do not parse or construct cursors.

ChunkingConfig.description: How documents in this knowledge base are split into chunks before embedding.

overlap.description: Number of overlapping characters between adjacent chunks.

ChunkingConfigInput.description: Chunking configuration for the knowledge base. Defaults are applied when omitted.

overlap.description: Number of overlapping characters between adjacent chunks.

KnowledgeBase.description: A knowledge base: a collection of documents indexed for vector and tag search.

description.description: Optional description of the knowledge base. null when not set.

tokenCount.description: Total number of tokens across all indexed documents.

embeddingModel.description: The embedding model used to index documents in this knowledge base.

embeddingDimension.description: The dimensionality of the embedding vectors.

docCount.description: Number of documents in the knowledge base.

connectorTypes.description: The set of external connector types that have synced documents into this knowledge base.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the knowledge base was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the knowledge base was last modified.

CreateKnowledgeBaseBody.description: Request body for creating a knowledge base.

workspaceId.description: The workspace the knowledge base belongs to.

description.description: Optional description of the knowledge base.

UpdateKnowledgeBaseBody.description: Request body for updating a knowledge base. At least one of name, description, or chunkingConfig must be provided.

workspaceId.description: The workspace the knowledge base belongs to.

description.description: New description of the knowledge base.

DocumentSummary.description: Summary representation of a document, returned in list operations and as the upload acknowledgement.

knowledgeBaseId.description: The knowledge base this document belongs to.

filename.description: Original filename of the uploaded document.

fileSize.description: Size of the file in bytes.

processingStatus.description: Current processing state of the document.

chunkCount.description: Number of chunks the document was split into. 0 until processing completes.

tokenCount.description: Total number of tokens extracted from the document.

characterCount.description: Total number of characters extracted from the document.

enabled.description: Whether the document is enabled for search.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was uploaded.

Document.description: Full document detail: the summary fields plus processing state and connector provenance.

knowledgeBaseId.description: The knowledge base this document belongs to.

filename.description: Original filename of the uploaded document.

fileSize.description: Size of the file in bytes.

processingStatus.description: Current processing state of the document.

chunkCount.description: Number of chunks the document was split into. 0 until processing completes.

tokenCount.description: Total number of tokens extracted from the document.

characterCount.description: Total number of characters extracted from the document.

enabled.description: Whether the document is enabled for search.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was uploaded.

processingError.description: Error message if processing failed, otherwise null.

processingStartedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when processing started, or null.

processingCompletedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when processing completed, or null.

connectorId.description: Identifier of the connector that synced this document, or null for direct uploads.

connectorType.description: Type of the connector that synced this document, or null for direct uploads.

sourceUrl.description: Original source URL of the document for connector-synced documents, or null.

SearchTagFilter.description: A structured tag filter applied to search. Tag filters are only supported when searching a single knowledge base.

tagName.description: The display name of the tag to filter on.

operator.description: Comparison operator. Valid operators depend on the field type.

valueTo.description: Upper bound for the `between` operator (number or date).

SearchBody.description: Request body for knowledge search. At least one of `query` or `tagFilters` must be provided.

workspaceId.description: The workspace that owns the knowledge bases.

knowledgeBaseIds.description: A single knowledge base ID or an array of up to 20 IDs to search.

oneOf.description: An array of knowledge base IDs.

query.description: The natural-language query for semantic vector search. Required if `tagFilters` is omitted.
query.example: How do I reset my password?

topK.description: Maximum number of results to return.

tagFilters.description: Structured tag filters. Only supported when searching a single knowledge base. Required if `query` is omitted.

SearchResult.description: A single search hit (a matching document chunk).

documentId.description: Identifier of the document the chunk belongs to.

documentName.description: Filename of the source document, or null if unavailable.

sourceUrl.description: Original source URL of the document, or null for direct uploads.

content.example: To reset your password, open Settings and choose "Security".

chunkIndex.description: Zero-based index of the chunk within its document.

metadata.description: The document's tag values keyed by tag display name. Values are user-defined and may be strings, numbers, booleans, or dates.

similarity.description: Similarity score in the range 0–1 for vector search (higher is more similar). 1 for tag-only matches.

results.description: The matching chunks, ordered by relevance.

query.description: The query that was executed (empty string for tag-only search).
query.example: How do I reset my password?

knowledgeBaseIds.description: The knowledge base IDs that were searched.

topK.description: The maximum number of results requested.

id.description: The id of the resource that was deleted.

details.description: Optional structured context for the error, such as field-level validation issues.

BadRequest.description: The request was malformed or failed validation. Inspect `error.details` for field-level issues.

Unauthorized.description: The API key is missing or invalid. Ensure the X-API-Key header is set with a valid key.

Forbidden.description: The authenticated caller does not have access to the requested workspace or resource.

NotFound.description: The requested resource does not exist or is not accessible from this workspace.

Conflict.description: The request conflicts with the current state of the resource (for example, a resource with the same name already exists).

UsageLimitExceeded.description: The workspace has exceeded its usage or billing limits. Upgrade the plan to continue.

error.message: Usage limit exceeded. Please upgrade your plan to continue.

PayloadTooLarge.description: The request payload exceeds the allowed size, or the workspace storage limit has been reached.

UnsupportedMediaType.description: The uploaded file's MIME type or extension is not supported.

RateLimited.description: The rate limit has been exceeded. Retry after the period indicated by the Retry-After header.

InternalError.description: An unexpected error occurred on the server.
